title: Casey Neistat Quote
excerpt: Don't just think about doing things, actually go and DO them. Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush…
body:
Don't just think about doing things, actually go and DO them. 

Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the Princeton Select brush online here at Joann.  If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
